texto: Already she knew that an idea could pain him like a bruise. He had grey eyes that showed every thought, and sometimes Charlotte worried that he might be hurt in some way that she would not be able to prevent.
explicacao: Metáfora atribuída a Lauren Owen: compara elementos do cotidiano para falar de passagem do tempo e prioridades. O trecho “Already she knew that an idea could pain him like a bruise. He had grey eyes that showed every th…” usa imagem concreta para lembrar que familia, fantasy, foreshadowing pedem movimento e interpretação pessoal, em tom de foreshadowing e gothic.
